data.title: Bybit Hacker Converts ETH to DAI Using Multiple DEXs
data.description: According to PANews, recent monitoring by lmk.fun (formerly Scopescan) has revealed that a hacker targeting Bybit is actively converting Ethereum (ETH) into DAI using multiple decentralized exchanges (DEXs). The hacker has transferred $3.64 million worth of ETH to another address and is currently moving DAI out of the account.

data.title: Solana Network Mints 8.25 Billion USDC Since January 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, Lookonchain has reported that since January 1, 2025, the Solana network has minted 8.25 billion USDC. This significant activity highlights the ongoing developments and usage within the Solana blockchain ecosystem.

data.title: A whale deposited 14,977 ETH into Binance in the past two hours, equivalent to $40.57 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale deposited 14,977 ETH (about 40.57 million US dollars) into Binance in the past 2 hours. 
Between April 28, 2023 and June 26, 2023, the whale withdrew 32,417 ETH (about 60.5 million US dollars) from Binance at an average price of 1,866 US dollars. Since March 20, 2024, the whale has deposited 30,748 ETH (about 90.37 million US dollars) into Binance at an average price of 2,939 US dollars. There are currently 3,920 ETH (about 10.57 million US dollars) left in its address, with a total profit of more than 40 million US dollars.

data.title: Bybit hackers used multiple DEXs to convert ETH to DAI and transfer DAI out
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to lmk.fun monitoring, Bybit hackers used multiple DEXs (including OKX DEX) to exchange ETH for DAI. The hacker sent $3.64 million in ETH to another address, exchanged ETH for DAI and transferred DAI out.

data.title: Solana Chain Meme Coin Conan Project Team Announces Complete Relinquishment of Control
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Solana chain Trump concept coin Conan project team announced the successful completion of 19.5% token destruction, with a value of approximately US$3 million. The team officially gave up all control and achieved fully decentralized governance. 2% of the tokens were sent to the Binance address, and the rest of the tokens have been transferred to the black hole address. The project will be completely led by the community in the future.

data.title: CZ: I recommend reading the security tips I wrote 5 years ago, which may help you avoid hacker attacks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted on the X platform, "On Sunday I updated this encryption security article I wrote five years ago, reducing it from 5,500 words to 4,300 words. If you haven't read it before, I recommend it. It may help you avoid a hacker attack you never know about."

data.title: ZachXBT: The 50 million USDC stolen from Infini has not been sold out yet, and the Circle team has not taken any action
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News ZachXBT said in X’s response to the Infini incident: “About 50 million USDC stolen from Infini were not all sold in about 40 minutes, but where is Circle’s 24/7 incident response team? Yes, I forgot they don’t exist because Circle knowingly supports such activities.”

data.title: Usual's Systems Remain Secure Amid Infini Security Breach
data.description: According to Foresight News, Usual has announced that its USDC Vault, Morpho, and MEV Capital were not affected by the recent Infini security breach. The attacker extracted funds deposited by Infini from the Morpho MEV Capital Usual USDC Vault. However, this incident did not impact the vault, Morpho, or Usual, and all systems continue to operate securely. Usual has expressed support for the Infini team in addressing the situation.

data.title: Infini Faces $50 Million USDC Theft, Questions Raised Over Circle's Response
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain investigator ZachXBT reported on Platform X that approximately 50 million USDC was stolen from Infini in about 40 minutes. However, not all of the stolen funds were sold immediately. ZachXBT questioned the absence of Circle's 24/7 incident response team, suggesting that Circle knowingly supports such activities.

data.title: BitMEX is about to launch XBTJ25 futures trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMEX will launch XBTJ25 futures trading at 12:00 (UT+8) on February 25, supporting up to 100 times leverage and 75 XBT risk limit. Trading will end on April 25, 2025.
